chapter_title: About Dislike of Performing the voluntary Prayer

hadith_entries.text:
1010. Narrated Abu-Huraira; The Messenger of Allah *
said: "If Al Iqamah was delivered, let there be no prayer other
than the obligatory prayer." (At-Termizi).
Some people of knowledge of the Prophet's companions
and others said: 'If Al Iqamah for (the obligatory prayer was
delivered, the man should not perform any prayer other than
the prayer whose Iqamah has already been delivered.'
